name: Perez Cash Joyeria
description_short: Perez Cash Joyeria is a pawn shop located in Miami that accepts jewelry and valuables as collateral for cash loans, with onsite services and customer amenities.
description_long: Perez Cash Joyeria operates as a pawn shop in the Little Havana area of Miami, Florida, serving the local community with collateral-based lending services. The business is positioned in a accessible, customer-friendly location at 3611 W Flagler Street with ample parking and climate control. Based on the available business information, the company provides pawn services typical to the industry—accepting jewelry and other valuables as collateral in exchange for immediate cash. The name 'Joyeria' (Spanish for jewelry shop) suggests a particular focus on jewelry and precious metals, which is a common specialty within the pawn lending sector. Perez Cash Joyeria distinguishes itself through its attention to customer convenience, offering amenities such as air conditioning, wheelchair accessibility, and the ability to accept credit card payments—features not universal across all pawn shops. The business maintains a physical storefront with customer parking, indicating a commitment to walk-in accessibility and community engagement. For consumers facing immediate cash needs, the primary caveat is that pawn transactions involve surrendering personal property as collateral, and failure to repay within the specified timeframe typically results in forfeiture of the item. Interest rates and loan terms on pawn transactions are regulated at the state level but can vary significantly. Limited public information is available regarding specific interest rates, loan duration terms, or redemption policies, making it difficult to assess the competitiveness of their offers compared to other pawn operations in the Miami area.
pros: Located in easily accessible area with onsite parking for customers
Accepts credit card payments, adding payment flexibility
Wheelchair accessible location accommodates customers with mobility needs
Air-conditioned facility provides comfortable transaction environment
Direct phone contact available at (305) 541-1821 for inquiries
Specializes in jewelry and precious metals based on business name
Established local business with recognizable brand presence in Miami
cons: No website with detailed terms, rates, or policies publicly available
Pawn transactions result in loss of personal property if loan not repaid
Limited transparency on interest rates, fees, and loan term options
No online application or quote process information provided
Collateral-based lending carries inherent risk of item forfeiture
best_for: Miami-area residents with jewelry or precious metals who need immediate cash
People seeking quick collateral-based loans without credit checks
Individuals who prefer in-person transactions and want to inspect their collateral
diagnosis: Perez Cash Joyeria is best for Miami residents who own jewelry or precious metals and need immediate cash without a credit check or income verification. The main caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering personal property as collateral, and failure to repay within the loan term results in permanent loss of the item—making this suitable only for valuables customers can afford to lose.
services: Pawn loans using jewelry as collateral
Pawn loans using precious metals as collateral
Cash advances in exchange for valuables
Item redemption and loan repayment services
